title: Entity
description: An abstract base type for compound nodes.
$comment:
This is an abstract base type used in Stencila Schema for non-atomic document and
metadata nodes.

It exists to provide a lightweight foundation for structured nodes in the
schema, separate from schema.org's broader [`Thing`](./thing.md) model. It
gives all compound nodes explicit `type` and optional `id` properties that are
analogous to JSON-LD's `@type` and `@id`.

Key properties include `type` and `id`.

type.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@type` keyword.

id.$comment: This is a special property analogous to JSON-LD's `@id` keyword.
